title: elaeocarpus crenatus
intro: Elaeocarpus crenatus, also known as the Toothed Elaeocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus crenatus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing protection against oxidative stress. It is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and may also be used in topical preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
